evidence: Paper uses SHAP values, not impurity-based importance: "SHAP values were estimated using the R package fastshap (version 0.1.0) from random forest models using ranger (version 0.14.1)." Features are ranked by mean absolute SHAP value and visualized via partial dependence plots. Main conclusions concern GHG-yield trade-offs and regional adoption patterns; feature importance analysis is explanatory rather than central.
